positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a celestial fox spirit (Kitsune) curled amongst stylized constellations and deep-sea bioluminescence. The fox should have elegant, sweeping lines and a dreamy, ethereal presence. Composition must feature a central, balanced design suitable for printing on a t-shirt. Use a deep indigo and cosmic teal color palette, contrasted by glowing gold and subtle pearlescent white accents. High contrast, single-view, silhouette style with negative space emphasis. Clean, geometric, tattoo art style. Intricate detailing, volumetric lighting, vector illustration quality.
